questions.hindi: मैं यह काम कर पाता हूँ।
questions.english: I am able to do this work.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can")
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I am able to do this work."

questions.hindi: वह तेज़ दौड़ पाती है।
questions.english: She is able to run fast.
questions.hint: Use the pattern: Subject + am/is/are + able to + base verb (ability, formal alternative to "can")
questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "She is able to run fast."

questions.hindi: मैं कल यह पूरा कर पाया।

questions.explanation: Correct sentence: "I was able to complete this yesterday."

questions.hindi: हम कल तक यह खत्म कर पाएंगे।
